name: SFA Team Performance
query:
SELECT 
    owner AS "Salesperson:Link/User:150",
    COUNT(name) AS "Total Visits:Int:100",
    SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'Order Taken' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Successful Orders:Int:120",
    SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'No Order' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "No Orders:Int:100",
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'Order Taken' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(name)) * 100, 2) AS "Conversion Rate:Data:120"
FROM `tabVisit Log`
GROUP BY owner

name: SFA Expense Summary
query:
SELECT 
    sales_user AS "Salesperson:Link/User:150",
    expense_type AS "Expense Type:Data:120",
    SUM(amount) AS "Total Amount:Currency:120",
    COUNT(name) AS "Entries:Int:80"
FROM `tabSFA Expense`
GROUP BY sales_user, expense_type

name: SFA Visit & Value Report
query:
SELECT 
    v.owner AS "Salesperson:Link/User:150",
    v.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:150",
    v.custom_latitude AS "Lat:Data:100",
    v.custom_longitude AS "Lng:Data:100",
    v.start_time AS "Check-In:Datetime:150",
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, v.start_time, v.end_time) AS "Duration (Mins):Int:100",
    v.outcome AS "Outcome:Data:100",
    IFNULL(SUM(s.grand_total), 0) AS "Order Value:Currency:120"
FROM `tabVisit Log` v
LEFT JOIN `tabSales Order` s ON v.customer = s.customer AND DATE(v.start_time) = s.transaction_date AND s.docstatus = 1
GROUP BY v.name
ORDER BY v.start_time DESC

name: SFA Leads
query:
SELECT
    c.name as 'Customer:Link/Customer:200',
    c.customer_name as 'Customer Name:Data:250',
    c.territory as 'Territory:Link/Territory:150',
    c.creation as 'Created On:Datetime:150'
FROM `tabCustomer` c
LEFT JOIN `tabSales Order` so ON c.name = so.customer
WHERE c.disabled = 0
GROUP BY c.name
HAVING COUNT(so.name) = 0
ORDER BY c.creation DESC

name: SFA Daily Collections
query:
SELECT
    pe.posting_date as 'Date:Date:120',
    u.full_name as 'Collected By:Data:200',
    pe.party_name as 'Customer:Data:200',
    pe.mode_of_payment as 'Mode:Data:120',
    pe.paid_amount as 'Amount:Currency:150'
FROM `tabPayment Entry` pe
JOIN `tabUser` u ON pe.owner = u.email
WHERE pe.docstatus = 1 AND pe.payment_type = 'Receive'
ORDER BY pe.posting_date DESC
